info.name: Eagle Bank API — All Test Scenarios
info.description:
Complete test suite for the Eagle Bank API.

HOW TO RUN:
1. Select the 'Eagle Bank' environment (set baseUrl = http://localhost:3000)
2. Run folder '0. SETUP' — creates all users, accounts, transactions
3. Run any test suite (1-4) in any order
4. Run '5. TEARDOWN' to delete all data and clear env vars
5. You can then re-run Setup and start fresh

To reset and start again: Run TEARDOWN then SETUP.

exec: pm.test("Has details array", () => {  const b = pm.response.json();  pm.expect(b).to.have.property("details");  pm.expect(b.details).to.be.an("array").with.length.above(0);});
pm.test("details includes field 'email'", () => {  const found = pm.response.json().details.some(d => d.field === "email");  pm.expect(found, "field email not in details").to.be.true;});

item.name: ✅ List accounts — returns own accounts only → 200

exec: pm.test("all accounts belong to user", () => {  const accs = pm.response.json().accounts;  pm.expect(accs.length).to.be.above(0);});

item.name: ✅ List accounts — other user has no access to main accounts

exec: pm.test("Other user only sees their own accounts", () => {  const accs = pm.response.json().accounts;  const mainAccNum = pm.environment.get("accountNumber");  pm.expect(accs.some(a => a.accountNumber === mainAccNum)).to.be.false;});
pm.test("Balance should have decreased (verify via GET account)", () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

pm.test("each tx has required fields", () => {  const t = pm.response.json().transactions[0];  pm.expect(t).to.have.all.keys("id","amount","currency","type","createdTimestamp","userId");});

item.name: ✅ List transactions — empty account → 200 empty array
❌ List transactions on another user's account → 403
❌ Fetch transaction on another user's account → 403
❌ Fetch transaction — transactionId belongs to different account → 404

exec: pm.test("Note: transactionId2 belongs to accountNumber2, not accountNumber", () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

item.name: 5. TEARDOWN — Run to reset & start fresh
3. Delete main account (accountNumber) — also clears transactions

exec: pm.test("Environment cleared — ready to run Setup again", () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);
